expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states it cannot demonstrate/verify the case focus due to missing supporting-issue inputs: execution_notes.md: "No supporting issues were provided/detectable in the evidence bundle, so it’s impossible (under blind evidence rules) to demonstrate that Phase 1: routes supporting issues as `context_only_no_defect_analysis`, and produces ... artifacts." result.md concludes: "FAIL (blocked by missing required benchmark inputs/evidence)" and says the supporting-issue path "cannot be exercised or verified". This does not satisfy the expectation that the case focus is covered.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: Both files keep scope to Phase 1: result.md header says "Phase 1 Contract Check" and "Primary phase under test: phase1" and notes "This report stays strictly within Phase 1 requirements"; execution_notes.md: "Output limited to Phase 1 contract verification...; no Phase 2+ artifacts or logic were generated/reviewed."
